narrative:
Precinct Aurora 4-B (precinct in Portage County) has 1,315 registered voters, with 52.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.8%, a modest Republican lean of 5.8 percentage points.
